playbook.intent: Open req → first owned feature shipped by day 45 in an in-house product team (not agency client engagement).
playbook.scope: Funnel from job posting → sourcing → structured interview → offer → 30/60-day onboarding tuned for in-house product context. Output: new hire shipping their first owned feature by day 45, fully ramped on the codebase orientation tour, role-specific interview rubric used during hiring, and in-house take-home design (not agency-style "build me a thing").

success-criteria.criterion: Structured interview run with role-specific rubric
First owned feature shipped by day 45
Day-60 retro between hire + manager + buddy

stage.name: Open req + structured interview
stage.intent: Funnel → structured interview with role-specific rubric → offer.
stage.decision-gate: Advance only with a hire decision backed by rubric evidence + bias check.

stage.name: Day 1-14: orient + first PR
stage.intent: Hire is incident-literate, has run the dev loop locally, has merged a small PR.
stage.decision-gate: Advance when 14-day retro passes. Repeating week-1 problems = block.

stage.name: Day 15-45: own a feature
stage.intent: Hire scopes, designs, ships their first owned feature.

tasks.task: Hire takes a small RFC + scopes spec

stage.decision-gate: Required: shipped feature behind a flag. Half-shipped doesn't count.

stage.name: Day 60: retro + retention

tasks.task: Update mistake-memory + pattern-memory with onboarding lessons

stage.decision-gate: Required: written retro. If retention signals are weak, escalate now, not at day 90.

extra.value: [Agency client engagement onboarding — different problem, Compensation / negotiation — separate workstream, Performance reviews past day 60 — out of scope]
[Open req tied to a quarter OKR, Hiring funnel + technical-interview-process playbooks available, Codebase has CLAUDE.md + AGENTS.md context pyramid]

[Agency-style take-home for an in-house role — wrong signal, 30/60 plan filed but never reviewed — guarantees drift, Skipping the day-60 retro 'because things look fine' — misses early retention signals, No first owned feature by day 45 — hire learns the team isn't serious about ramp]
['Can the hire describe the team''s spec→ship chain end-to-end?', 'Did the first owned feature ship through the same gates as everyone else?', 'Is the 60-day retro written and shared?']

{human: faion get-content hire-to-productive-60-days-in-house --format md, agent: faion get-content hire-to-productive-60-days-in-house --format context, json: faion get-content hire-to-productive-60-days-in-house --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P6 product-dev team persona}]
